variants: Tasja Groenwegen is a noted expert in paleoclimatology who currently resides in Cottonbirch Dell. She is recognized for her invention of the Elemental Pulse Engine, a device that has significantly advanced the study of historical climate variations. In acknowledgment of her contributions to science, Tasja was awarded the Cliffspire Laurel. Alongside her research, she actively participates in the Glassmakers Guildhall, connecting her scientific knowledge with her artistic endeavors in glassmaking.
